task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the required climate datasets in a data viewer (like Panoply).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a data viewer application (e.g., Panoply) open with 'pres.mon.ltm.nc' and 'prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc' loaded in the sources or datasets panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent extracted the January surface pressure at the target coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a data grid, array view, or plot tool displaying the surface pressure variable for January (time index 0) at Latitude -22.5 (22.5 S) and Longitude 292.5 (67.5 W), showing a value of approximately 629.8 mb or 62981.6 Pa.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent extracted the January precipitation rate at the target coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a data grid, array view, or plot tool displaying the precipitation rate variable for January (time index 0) at the nearest grid cell (Latitude ~-21.9, Longitude 292.5), showing a value of approximately 3.798e-05 kg/m^2/s.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent exported the surface pressure map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a saved file named 'atacama_pres_jan.png' in the ~/Documents/Observatory/ directory, or a save dialog actively exporting this map plot.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent exported the precipitation rate map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a saved file named 'atacama_precip_jan.png' in the ~/Documents/Observatory/ directory, or a save dialog actively exporting this map plot.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the structured site validation report with the extracted values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor or file manager with 'site_validation_report.txt' in ~/Documents/Observatory/, containing the extracted values (629.8 mb / 62981.6 Pa and ~3.798e-05 kg/m^2/s).

integrity.description: Ensure the exported PNG files are actual data visualizations and not empty or renamed files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported 'atacama_pres_jan.png' and 'atacama_precip_jan.png' should visibly contain plotted maps with color scales, not blank images or text.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually interacted with the dataset files to find the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent navigating the dataset variables (e.g., in Panoply or via a Python script output) rather than just typing the final report from external knowledge.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent saved the outputs in the correct requested directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths in save dialogs, terminal windows, or file managers must explicitly show '/home/ga/Documents/Observatory/'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Coordinates: Latitude -22.5 (22.5 S), Longitude -67.5 (67.5 W, which is 292.5 E in 0-360 format). Expected January Surface Pressure: 629.81665 millibars (62981.665 Pascals). Expected January Precipitation Rate: ~3.79853e-05 kg/m^2/s (nearest grid cell is at lat -21.9044, lon 292.5). Output Directory: /home/ga/Documents/Observatory. Expected Files: atacama_pres_jan.png, atacama_precip_jan.png, site_validation_report.txt.
